_comment: R035: named human owner + escalation for payout / finance-review exceptions. HONEST DEFAULT: owner is UNSET, so the validator and payout-exception monitor fail closed and surface 'no finance owner assigned' as a blocker. HUMAN STEP: a real, accountable person must fill in owner.name/handle/email, at least one escalation contact, and confirm the review SLA, then commit this file (or set BLUEPRINT_FINANCE_OWNERSHIP_CONFIG_PATH to a deployed copy).
